per_episode.task_description: Pick up the brown pinecone keychain with charm and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl
Pick up the sleek slim dark phone with camera and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl
Pick up the plastic cup and place it in or on the white bowl
Pick up the white paper towel roll unrolled and place it in or on the white bowl with liquid soup
Pick up the slim blue remote control and place it in or on the gray bowl
Pick up the transparent glass salt shaker with salt and place it in or on the round gray ceramic bowl
Pick up the slim dark cellphone with buttons and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl with rim
Pick up the means and place it in or on the translucent smooth glass conical bowl
Pick up the golden crescent croissant and place it in or on the rectangular vintage metal storage tin
Pick up the spray and place it in or on the red patterned bowl
